'''Kevta''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] who sympathized with [[Workers|the Workers]] of [[New Apsolon/Legends|New Apsolon]]. In [[41 BBY/Legends|41 BBY]], he, along with [[Yanci]] and [[Bini (miner)|Bini]] were confused by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Eritha]], believing that they were members of [[Absolutes|the Absolutes]]. The trio attacked them, and injured Obi-Wan. When Kevta and his allies realized that they were wrong, Yanci offered her medical knowledge to cure Kenobi's leg. When the Padawan was better, Kenobi, Jinn and Eritha left the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] facility. Some time later, Kevta was killed when the Absolutes attacked the mine.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Death of Hope]]'' {{1st}}
